title: Project Creation Taxonomy Fix — MCP & Multi-Tenant Safety

0837a.title: Auto-Assign Series Number (Root cause fix)
0837a.summary: When series_number is not provided, auto-assign MAX(series_number)+1 scoped to tenant_key + project_type_id. Uses two-step locking: SELECT FOR UPDATE on matching rows first, then aggregate query for next number. Includes soft-deleted rows since uq_project_taxonomy constraint does not exclude them.

files_modified.change: Added auto-assign block at lines 211-245 in create_project(). When series_number is None: lock rows with FOR UPDATE, compute COALESCE(MAX(series_number),0)+1, assign result. Existing duplicate check for explicit series_number moved to else branch.

files_created.change: 7 integration tests covering: sequential assignment, multi-project creation, explicit taxonomy preserved, per-type independence, soft-delete accounting, cross-tenant independence.

key_decisions: FOR UPDATE cannot be combined with aggregate functions in PostgreSQL — split into lock query + separate MAX query.
Must include soft-deleted rows in MAX calculation because uq_project_taxonomy constraint has no WHERE clause excluding deleted_at IS NOT NULL.
No database migration needed — fix is application-level auto-assignment of values that satisfy the existing constraint.

0837b.title: Type Resolution by Label + MCP Schema
0837b.description: Add optional type parameter to create_project MCP tool. Resolve human-readable label to project_type_id via case-insensitive lookup. If type not found, create without type.

0837c.title: Slash Command Template Updates
0837c.description: Update /gil_add templates to pass type when user specifies a category for projects.

0837d.title: Multi-Tenant Constraint Audit
0837d.description: Audit every UniqueConstraint and unique=True column for lockout patterns similar to the uq_project_taxonomy bug.

root_cause.problem: NULLS NOT DISTINCT means (tenant_key, NULL, NULL, NULL) can only exist once. MCP create_project never passes taxonomy fields, so the second project per tenant always fails.
root_cause.fix_approach: Auto-assign series_number at application level when not provided. No constraint or migration change needed.

installation_impact: None. No migration needed. Fix is application-level only.

cascading_analysis.downstream: Projects created via MCP now always have series_number populated. Taxonomy alias display works for typed projects. Untyped projects show series number or name.
cascading_analysis.sibling: Tasks unaffected. Other projects unaffected. FOR UPDATE lock scoped to specific type+tenant combo.
